      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Drehbi ar to Sirgu
buhs weenam no teem Leelecim:
Kungeem Rohkâ doht/ un to
Wihru ar to apgehrbt/ ko tas
Kehnisch grib gohdiht/ un win-
nu liſt us to Sirgu jaht zaur
Pilsfahta Eelu/un winna Preek-
schâ iſjankt : Ta taps tam Wih-
ram darrihts/ ko tas Kehnisch
grib gohdiht."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehnisch
us Amann : Steidsees / Remun
to Drehbi un to Sirgu/ itt ka
tu eſt runnajs/ un darri ta tain
Schidam Mardakajum / kas
Kehnina Wahrtis fehsch/un lat
ne truhſt ne weens Wahrdg no
wiﬀa/ ko tu eſt runnajs."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Amans tahs
Drehbes un to Sirgu / un ap-
gehrbe Mardakaju/un likke win-
nu jaht zaur ta Pilsfahta Eelu/
un iſfanze winna Preekſcha/ ta
taps tam Wihram darrihts/ ko
tas Kehnisch grib gohdiht."
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to atgreesehs Mar-
dakajus us ta Kehnina Wahrtiis.
Bet Amans steidsehs at-
kat Mahjas / behdadamees un
ar atſſegtn Galiwu."
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Amans teize tawai
Seewat Seerefei/ un wiſſeem
taweem Drangeem wiſſu / kas
winnam bij notizzis. Tad faz-"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ziia winna Gundri us winnu/
Seecete winna Secwa: Ja M-
dakajus/ preekſch ka tu eſt i eef-
zis krist no to Judu Dsim-
ma irr/ tad ne eespehſi tu pr-
winnu ne neeka/ bet tu krisda-
krittift preekſch winna.
14. Kad tee wehl ar win-
runnaja/ tad atnahze ta Keh-
na Kambar-Junkuri / un sku-
binaja Amanu Dſihres nah-
ko Estere bij fataiſiſfi."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta VII. Nodalla.
Tas Kehnisch ar Amanu nahk us tahm D-
rehm / ko Estere bij fataiſiſfi : 1. Kas-
ta Kehnina luhdſpar fawu un fawo Zauns-
Dſihwibu : 3. Apfuhsf Amanu : 5/6. Pa-
fo tas Kehnisch apkaistahs : 7. Un l-
winnu Karatawas pakahrt/ ko win-
preekſch Mardakajus bij lizsis padarriht : 9
1. Ad nu tas Kehnisch u
Amans pee Esteres ta-
Kehninnes us Dſi-
rehm nahze /
2. Tad fazzija tas Kehnins-
us Esteri ohtrâDeena attak Wil-
nu dserroht: Ko luhdſ tu Kehn-
nine Estere ? tas taps ter-
dohts/ un ko praſſi tu? arridsa-
lihdſ puſs Walstibu/ tam buh-
notikt.
3. Tad atbildeja ta Kehninin-
ne Estere: Ja es af Kehninsd-
Scheblastibu efmu atradduti/u-
ja tas tam Kehninam patihk-
tad dohd man mann Dſihwibi-
mannas Luhaſchanas deht / u-
mannus Laudis mannas Praſſi-
ſchanas deht/
4. Jo mehs eſſam pahrdohti-
es un manni Laudis/ ka meh-
isdel"
